title: rhamnus × mulleyana
intro: Rhamnus × mulleyana, also known as Mulley's buckthorn, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Rhamnus cathartica and Rhamnus purshiana. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anthelmintic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rhamnus × mulleyana include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve diarrhea, and act as a natural laxative, as well as its antiseptic properties which can help in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Rhamnus × mulleyana include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
